zotero.abstractNote: We study online convex optimization with adversarial nonlinear constraints. In this setting, a learner aims to minimize a sequence of convex loss functions while satisfying a sequence of nonlinear constraints that are revealed sequentially. We propose a novel algorithm that achieves sublinear regret and sublinear constraint violation. Our algorithm is based on a primal-dual approach that uses a regularized Lagrangian. We provide a theoretical analysis of the regret and constraint violation bounds, and we demonstrate the effectiveness of our approach on several numerical examples.
